data.title: Write failing tests for scaffold-adapter.sh (mock templates, idempotency, generative mode)
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Create tests/scripts/test-scaffold-adapter.sh with behavioral tests for scaffold-adapter.sh. Uses mock template directories. Tests must fail (RED) before scaffold-adapter.sh exists.

### Tests:
1. test_adapter_invocation_flask: RECIPE_NAME=scaffold-route RECIPE_PARAM_FRAMEWORK=flask RECIPE_PARAM_ROUTE=users → returns JSON exit_code=0, files_changed contains expected files
2. test_adapter_invocation_nextjs: RECIPE_PARAM_FRAMEWORK=nextjs → returns JSON exit_code=0
3. test_output_is_valid_json: JSON has files_changed, transforms_applied, errors, exit_code, degraded, engine_name
4. test_unknown_framework_returns_error: RECIPE_PARAM_FRAMEWORK=unknown → exit_code=1, errors non-empty
5. test_idempotency_skip: Run scaffold-route twice on same route — second run skips (files already exist), returns files_changed=[], exit_code=0
6. test_determinism: 3 runs → files_changed lists are identical
7. test_generative_rollback_on_failure: Scaffold partially creates files then fails. Adapter cleans up created files (not stash pop). Verify no partial files remain after failure.
8. test_params_via_env: RECIPE_PARAM_ROUTE, RECIPE_PARAM_FRAMEWORK etc. passed via env, no shell interpolation

Also add .test-index entry: plugins/dso/scripts/recipe-adapters/scaffold-adapter.sh: tests/scripts/test-scaffold-adapter.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/scripts/test-scaffold-adapter.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/scripts/test-scaffold-adapter.sh
- [ ] Valid bash syntax
  Verify: bash -n tests/scripts/test-scaffold-adapter.sh
- [ ] Tests fail in RED phase
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-scaffold-adapter.sh 2>&1; [ $? -ne 0 ]
- [ ] .test-index entry added for scaffold-adapter.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'scaffold-adapter.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
